(d/b/a Fermi America) (NASDAQ & LSE: FRMI), operating as Fermi America™, today announced that it has secured a $165 million senior secured, first lien delayed draw term loan from CSG Investments, Inc., an affiliate of Beal Bank USA, to finance the remaining progress payments on its previously ordered six Siemens Energy SGT-800-57 gas turbines, with delivery scheduled in 2028.
